action: Generate one realistic AI video per genre using the assigned avatar and script
fallback_action: Retry with reducing the script length. If the retry still fails, notify the user with an error message indicating the failure to generate the video.

recipe.steps: Retrieve the assigned avatars for each genre from memory
Generate one realistic AI video using the assigned avatar and narration script for each genre using the Generate_video tool
Save the conversation IDs for each genre in memory
